---
title: 'RMarkdown: Basics'
output: 
  html_document:
  toc: FALSE
number_sections: TRUE
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

packages <- c('knitr', 
              'ggplot2', 
              'dplyr', 
              'tidyr', 
              'ggplot2')

lapply(packages, library, character.only=TRUE)
```

------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Question 1
